how_verified: MECHANISM proven by USE on the resident chat-4b (company gpu: chat-4b ~8.0GB resident, holding the card). (1) DISCOVERY: RoleRegistry().discover(['roles']) shows BOTH live — decompose_seed: can_fire=True, is_jury=False, op=generate, mode_scope={'spec'}; expand_criterion: same facets. The 'spec' cast = {decompose_seed, expand_criterion, ground_criterion} (the OTHER lane's ground_criterion landed concurrently and shares the cast as designed). LISTENING CAST UNTOUCHED — cast_for_mode('listening') is exactly the canonical 6 (check, connect, focus, ground, recall, voice); 'spec' is a new cast-beyond-listening context (unknown-mode→empty-cast, mirrors verify_lens's {'verification'}). SCHEMAS match the brief EXACTLY: DecomposeSeedOut.groups: list[Group{group_id:str, what:str, systems_touched:str}] (systems_touched is PROSE str, not a list — the register_element/HowTo nested-submodel pattern); ExpandCriterionOut{id:str, function:str, form:str, files_touched:list[str], reuse_or_netnew:str, preserves:str}. (2) FIRE BY USE (throwaway fresh-process harness /tmp/spec_map_byuse.py — NO create_role, NO commit): decompose_seed fired 1x1 via run_role(utterance='a registry of the system\'s named vocabularies, browsable + addable') → 4 well-formed groups (vocab-registry-core, vocab-browse-surface, vocab-addition-path, vocab-addressing), each {group_id, what, systems_touched} with systems_touched as prose. Then run_items(expand_criterion, those 4 groups, turn_id='spec-map-byuse') → 4 units, 0 failed, 0 skipped, concurrent finish_order=[0,2,1,3], wall=2.9s (the fan ran on the swarm). Every output validated against ExpandCriterionOut (exact 6 keys, files_touched a list). BOTH FACES present on every criterion: FUNCTION non-empty AND FORM non-empty — the model wrote a real design-system FORM bar for the surface groups (browse-panel / authoring-panel / address-bar) AND the literal 'n/a' for the backend-only vocab-registry-core (FORM is half of done, honored). NO-FICTION coverage both branches: net-new for the genuinely-new registry, reuse:<file> for the build-on-existing groups. (3) FLOOR: tests/cognition_governance_acceptance.py = ALL 42 checks PASS (roles/* is in COG_SOURCES; both new files emit no resolve/approve/dispatch, launch no claude -p — the role-spec-no-forbidden-verb AST check passes; grep confirms the only resolve/approve/dispatch tokens are in docstring prose describing the floor, no executable calls, no subprocess/os.system). (4) DRIFT (expected): tests/roles_acceptance.py passes EVERY structural check (all 12 ok lines incl. 'a role's spec carries no resolve/approve/dispatch verb — the build-dispatch floor is lead-only') then reds at EXACTLY line 174 'drift: [decompose_seed, expand_criterion, ground_criterion, triad_synth]' — the un-reflected-role drift-home assertion — and nothing earlier. EXPECTED: I cannot edit roles/AGENTS.md this beat; the list is exactly the 4 new spec-compiler roles (my 2 + the other lane's 2), confirming no structural defect. Next beat reflects all 4 in roles/AGENTS.md and commits.
notes: DID NOT COMMIT (per brief). DID NOT edit roles/AGENTS.md (off-limits this beat — next beat's reflect-and-commit turns the one expected roles_acceptance red green for all 4 spec-compiler roles). Stayed file-disjoint: only roles/decompose_seed.py + roles/expand_criterion.py written; the ground+synth lane's roles/ground_criterion.py + roles/triad_synth.py landed concurrently (seen in the 'spec' cast + the drift list) and were NOT touched. THE PROOF IS MECHANISM, NOT CRITERION QUALITY: that the pair fires → validates the two-faced schema → both faces present → no-fiction honored on both branches — NOT that any drafted criterion is accurate/complete. Criterion quality is the downstream cascade (ground_criterion re-checks reuse vs the corpus; triad_synth assembles; a CONFIRM jury vs the seed per COMPOSITIONS ⑦ step 4) + my refinement + Tim's steer (PROPOSED → me → Tim; a draft, never a build off an unconfirmed compiled spec). HONEST CAVEAT (by design, not a defect): the model's reuse:<file> cites in the by-use run (reuse:suite/authoring/verbs.py, reuse:ui/address_registry.ts) are PRELIMINARY/proposed claims at the seed-author's grain — those exact paths are not real repo files. expand_criterion DELIBERATELY proposes the reuse-claim and DEFERS the authoritative no-fiction grounding to the OTHER lane's ground_criterion (COMPOSITIONS ⑦ step 2c, re-reads each criterion against the corpus → reuse(cite)|net-new(honest)) — exactly as register_element proposes a dossier and defers refcheck/jury to RG6. The role's docstring states this deferral explicitly so the next-beat cascade builder does not mistake expand's reuse-claim for ground-truth. CASCADE WIRING for the next beat: save_cascade({name:'spec-compiler', steps:[{op:'generate',role:'decompose_seed'},{op:'generate',role:'expand_criterion',kind:'items'},{op:'generate',role:'ground_criterion',kind:'items'},{op:'reduce',role:'triad_synth',reduce_mode:'role'}]}); run_cascade('spec-compiler', inputs='${seed}'). The seed enters step 0 (decompose_seed) as the threaded inputs; each step's output threads to the next (decompose→expand→ground→triad_synth). DESIGN: input_addresses stays the DEFAULT ('utterance',) on both roles — decompose's seed IS the utterance (1x1 run_role); expand's group {group_id,what,systems_touched} rides at ctx['utterance'] (run_items places each unit there, byte-identical default run_role framing) with group_id/what/systems_touched as KEYS inside the unit dict, NOT declared inputs (declaring them would trip the net-new compose path). The per-unit corpus-slice + few-shot (COMPOSITIONS ⑦ step 1) ride INTO the same unit when the cascade supplies them — the corpus-grounded retrieve is the embedder-window enhancement, not required this beat. by-use harness at /tmp/spec_map_byuse.py.
